positive: Stylized geometric celestial map illustration, featuring interconnected constellations and celestial bodies formed by clean, interlocking tribal lines. The main subject is a harmonious arrangement of a crescent moon, a stylized shooting star trail, and several abstract planetary orbits, rendered in a monochrome gradient of deep indigo, cyan, and luminous gold accents. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, suitable for a repeat print pattern or central apparel graphic. Use a clean, vector-art aesthetic with strong negative space, crisp lines, and high contrast, mimicking linocut or etched woodblock style. Minimalist, magical, cosmic, dreamy, intricate. --ar 1:1
